description: Copilot & Windsurf platform support, self-hosted registry, OpenCode dispatch fix, 6-phase task lifecycle
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(copilot): add GitHub Copilot platform support with standalone prompt templates and hook tracking
- feat(windsurf): add full workflow support for Windsurf IDE — rules, workflows, and AI configuration
- feat(cli): support self-hosted GitLab/GitHub Enterprise URLs in --registry (#131)
- feat(cli): statusLine integration for Claude Code (#127)
- feat(cli): CodeBuddy platform support, Codex agent improvements (#128, #116)
- refactor(task): update next_action template to 6-phase lifecycle (brainstorm→research→implement→check→update-spec→record-session)
- refactor: migrate marketplace to standalone repo as submodule (#117)

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(opencode): make dispatch wait for child tasks synchronously instead of background polling (#147)
- fix(hooks): normalize .current-task path refs across platforms (#130)
- fix(codex): resolve {{PYTHON_CMD}} placeholder in hooks.json for Windows (#132)
- fix(cli): add_session git-add error handling and Python 3.10 version check
- fix(cli): support self-hosted GitLab/GHE URL parsing in template-fetcher
notes: Run `trellis update` to sync. New platforms: `trellis init --platform copilot` or `--platform windsurf`.
